Notice Of Motion To Quash Or Modify Deposition Subpoena For Production Of All Of Pltf'S Employment Records From Bank Of The West [Ccp 1986.5, 1987.1]
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to quash or modify employment records subpoena is granted in part. The subpoena is modified to only require production of documents reflecting plaintiff's duties, job description, compensation, W-2 forms, pay stubs, and information, including but not limited to medical records, concerning the condition of, and / or injury to, plaintiff's back. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT, NORAH STONE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Nora M. Nachtsheim, Esq., Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, (415) 438-5934, appearing for Defendant, Norah Stone, defendant, and moving party; Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq., of M C Hall & Associates, (415) 512-9865; appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion Of Pltf To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One), Production Of A Verification, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Norman C. Stone And His Attorneys; Memorandum Of P/A; Separate Statement Of Request For Production.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: John Paul Koehler

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff John Paul Koehler's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents and for a verification is granted. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-09-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-17-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 502
